query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Number Of Applications
panels.description: Number of applications present in the ArgoCD Dashboard

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Repository Servers
panels.description: Number for Repository present in the ArgoCD Dashboard

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Application Health Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of application health statuses across all apps

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, health_status, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'health_status') AS health_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, health_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, health_status ORDER BY time

panels.title: Sync Status Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of application sync statuses across all apps

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sync_status, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'sync_status') AS sync_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, sync_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, sync_status ORDER BY time

panels.title: Healthy
panels.description: Number of healthly applications in ArgoCD Dashboard

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'health_status') AS health_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, health_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND health_status='Healthy' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Progressing
panels.description: Number of applications that are currently in progress

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'health_status') AS health_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, health_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND health_status='Progressing' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Suspended
panels.description: Number of application which are suspended

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'health_status') AS health_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, health_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND health_status='Suspended' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Degraded
panels.description: Number of application which are degraded

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'health_status') AS health_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, health_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND health_status='Degraded' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Synced
panels.description: Shows the number of the synced application in the ArgoCD Dashboard

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'sync_status') AS sync_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, sync_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND sync_status='Synced' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: OutOfSync
panels.description: Number of applications which are out of sync

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'sync_status') AS sync_status, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, sync_status, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND sync_status='OutOfSync' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Applications By Repository
panels.description: Shows applications count by repository over the time

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, repo, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'repo') AS repo, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_info' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_info' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, repo, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, repo ORDER BY time

panels.title: Sync activity
panels.description: Show different phases of sync activity

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, phase, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, phase, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'phase') AS phase, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_sync_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_sync_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, phase, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, phase ORDER BY time

panels.title: Reconciliation activity
panels.description: Shows Application reconciliation count over the time

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, namespace, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, namespace, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'namespace') AS namespace, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_reconcile.count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_reconcile.count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, namespace, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, namespace ORDER BY time

panels.title: Count of Application Reconciliation by Duration Bounds
panels.description: Shows the count of application reconciliation by Duration Bounds

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, namespace, round(quant,6) AS value FROM (SELECT time, namespace, arraySort(x -> x.1, groupArray((le_f, c))) AS pairs, arrayMap(x -> x.1, pairs) AS les, arrayMap(x -> x.2, pairs) AS cum, cum[length(cum)] AS total, 0.50 * total AS rnk, arrayFirstIndex(y -> y >= rnk, cum) AS idx, multiIf(total=0,0, idx<=1,les[1], idx>=length(les),les[length(les)-1], les[idx-1] + (les[idx]-les[idx-1])*(rnk-cum[idx-1])/(cum[idx]-cum[idx-1])) AS quant FROM (SELECT time, namespace, le_f, sum(r) AS c FROM (SELECT time, fp, namespace, le_f, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp, le_f ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'namespace') AS namespace, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, if(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le')='+Inf', 1e18, toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le'))) AS le_f, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_reconcile.bucket' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_reconcile.bucket' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, namespace, cluster, le_f) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote})) GROUP BY time, namespace, le_f) GROUP BY time, namespace) WHERE total > 0 ORDER BY time

panels.title: Reconciliation Performance
panels.description: Shows application reconciliation performance

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, round(quant,6) AS value FROM (SELECT time, arraySort(x -> x.1, groupArray((le_f, c))) AS pairs, arrayMap(x -> x.1, pairs) AS les, arrayMap(x -> x.2, pairs) AS cum, cum[length(cum)] AS total, 0.50 * total AS rnk, arrayFirstIndex(y -> y >= rnk, cum) AS idx, multiIf(total=0,0, idx<=1,les[1], idx>=length(les),les[length(les)-1], les[idx-1] + (les[idx]-les[idx-1])*(rnk-cum[idx-1])/(cum[idx]-cum[idx-1])) AS quant FROM (SELECT time, le_f, sum(r) AS c FROM (SELECT time, fp, le_f, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp, le_f ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, if(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le')='+Inf', 1e18, toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le'))) AS le_f, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_reconcile.bucket' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_reconcile.bucket' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster, le_f) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote})) GROUP BY time, le_f) GROUP BY time) WHERE total > 0 ORDER BY time

panels.title: K8s API Activity
panels.description: Shows the number of Kubernetes requests executed during application reconciliation

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, concat(resource_kind, ' / ', verb) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, verb, resource_kind, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'verb') AS verb, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'resource_kind') AS resource_kind, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_k8s_request_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_k8s_request_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, verb, resource_kind, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

panels.title: Workqueue Depth
panels.description: Current depth of workqueue

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, name, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='workqueue_depth' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='workqueue_depth' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time

panels.title: Age of Cluster Cache
panels.description: Cluster cache age in seconds.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, server, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server') AS server, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_cluster_cache_age_seconds' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_cluster_cache_age_seconds' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, server, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, server ORDER BY time

panels.title: Count of Cluster Resource Objects
panels.description: The number of kubernetes resource objects in the cache

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, server, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server') AS server, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_cluster_api_resource_objects' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_cluster_api_resource_objects' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, server, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, server ORDER BY time

panels.title: Count of Cluster Events
panels.description: The number of processed kubernetes events

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, server, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, server, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server') AS server, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_cluster_events_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_cluster_events_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, server, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, server ORDER BY time

panels.title: Count of API Resources
panels.description: The number of monitored kubernetes API resources

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, server, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server') AS server, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_cluster_api_resources' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_cluster_api_resources' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, server, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, server ORDER BY time

panels.title: Git Requests by Type
panels.description: Rate of git requests performed by the repo server, broken down by request type

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, request_type, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, request_type, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'request_type') AS request_type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_git_request_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_git_request_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, request_type, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, request_type ORDER BY time

panels.title: Cluster Connection Status
panels.description: Current connection status to each registered cluster (1=connected, 0=not connected)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, server, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server') AS server, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_cluster_connection_status' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_cluster_connection_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, server, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, server ORDER BY time

panels.title: Pending Repo Requests
panels.description: Number of pending requests requiring repository lock

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, repo, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'repo') AS repo, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_repo_pending_request_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_repo_pending_request_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, repo, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, repo ORDER BY time

panels.title: Git Request Duration (P99)
panels.description: 99th percentile of git request duration by repository

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, repo, round(quant,6) AS value FROM (SELECT time, repo, arraySort(x -> x.1, groupArray((le_f, c))) AS pairs, arrayMap(x -> x.1, pairs) AS les, arrayMap(x -> x.2, pairs) AS cum, cum[length(cum)] AS total, 0.99 * total AS rnk, arrayFirstIndex(y -> y >= rnk, cum) AS idx, multiIf(total=0,0, idx<=1,les[1], idx>=length(les),les[length(les)-1], les[idx-1] + (les[idx]-les[idx-1])*(rnk-cum[idx-1])/(cum[idx]-cum[idx-1])) AS quant FROM (SELECT time, repo, le_f, sum(r) AS c FROM (SELECT time, fp, repo, le_f, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp, le_f ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'repo') AS repo, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, if(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le')='+Inf', 1e18, toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le'))) AS le_f, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_git_request_duration_seconds.bucket' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_git_request_duration_seconds.bucket' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, repo, cluster, le_f) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote})) GROUP BY time, repo, le_f) GROUP BY time, repo) WHERE total > 0 ORDER BY time

panels.title: Orphaned Resources per App
panels.description: Number of orphaned resources per application

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, name, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS name, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='argocd_app_orphaned_resources_count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='argocd_app_orphaned_resources_count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, name, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, name ORDER BY time
